imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_link_if_exists%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_link_if_exists%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
{{high-use}}
{{expensive}}
<!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) -->
This is a simple helper template, to be used in other templates. It displays a link to a category if that category exists; otherwise it just displays greyed-out plaintext.

Optional display text may be added as a second parameter.

== Usage ==

{{Tlx|Category link if exists|CategoryName|OptionalDisplayText}}

;Simple usage: {{Tlx|Category link if exists|CategoryName}}
:Examples:
:* {{Tlx|Category link if exists|A non-existent category}} → {{Category link if exists|A non-existent category}}
:* {{Tlx|Category link if exists|United States}} → {{Category link if exists|United States}}
;With optional display text: {{Tlx|Category link if exists|CategoryName|DisplayText}}
:Examples:
:* {{Tlx|Category link if exists|A non-existent category|Foo}} → {{Category link if exists|A non-existent category|Foo}}
:* {{Tlx|Category link if exists|United States|USA}} → {{Category link if exists|United States|USA}}

==See also==
*[[Template:Category see also if exists]]
*[[Template:Category if exists]] – conditionally adds a parent category
*[[Template:Cat in use]] — allows checking of whether category is populated
*[[:en:Template:Link if exists|Template:Link if exists]]

<includeonly>{{sandbox other||
<!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly>

<noinclude>
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
